name: Annabel Lee Whitlock || WLW
description:
"Need Something, Pet?"

I really love Annabel, she's my comfort character. I realized I'd never made a bot of her even though I'd considered it, so here it is!

I hope you like it, I tried my best. If there are any errors or anything I could improve, please let me know. Oh, it's a modern version, outside of Nevermore. I hope you enjoy it! :)
creator: Drolta_Lover_But_Dead
